title: Introducing Velatum Newsroom
content:
Velatum Newsroom is a minimalist publishing platform designed for announcements, development logs, technical articles, and project updates.

Built around simplicity and performance, the platform delivers a distraction-free reading experience while maintaining a professional and modern aesthetic.

Features

• Clean black-and-white visual design

• Automatic light and dark theme support

• GitHub-powered content management

• Fast article search and category filtering

• Interactive index tree navigation

• Immersive full-screen reading mode

• Responsive layout for desktop and mobile devices

• Local caching for improved loading performance

• Infinite scrolling article feed

Content is managed through JSON-based posts, allowing updates to be published directly from a GitHub repository without requiring a traditional database or CMS.

Velatum Newsroom focuses on speed, readability, and long-term maintainability, providing a streamlined environment for sharing information, development progress, and official project communications.

Minimal. Fast. Structured.
